The working directory is empty, so I'll provide you with the configuration directly. Here are the key pieces:

## Environment Variables

For NativeAOT, `createdump` isn't bundled with the runtime, so you must set `DOTNET_CreateDumpPath` explicitly.

```yaml
env:
  - name: DOTNET_DbgEnableMiniDump
    value: "1"
  - name: DOTNET_DbgMiniDumpType
    value: "4"                          # Full dump (best for NativeAOT)
  - name: DOTNET_DbgMiniDumpName
    value: /tmp/dumps/%e.%p.%t.dmp      # executable.pid.timestamp
  - name: DOTNET_CreateDumpPath
    value: /opt/tools/createdump
```

## Pod Spec Changes

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: my-nativeaot-app
spec:
  containers:
    - name: app
      image: my-app:latest
      env:
        - name: DOTNET_DbgEnableMiniDump
          value: "1"
        - name: DOTNET_DbgMiniDumpType
          value: "4"
        - name: DOTNET_DbgMiniDumpName
          value: /tmp/dumps/%e.%p.%t.dmp
        - name: DOTNET_CreateDumpPath
          value: /opt/tools/createdump
      securityContext:
        capabilities:
          add:
            - SYS_PTRACE          # required — createdump uses ptrace
      volumeMounts:
        - name: dumps
          mountPath: /tmp/dumps
  volumes:
    - name: dumps
      emptyDir:
        sizeLimit: 4Gi            # adjust to your app's memory footprint
```

## Why each piece matters

| Setting | Reason |
|---|---|
| `DOTNET_CreateDumpPath` | NativeAOT has no bundled runtime — must point to `createdump` explicitly |
| `DbgMiniDumpType=4` (Full) | NativeAOT strips IL metadata; a full dump preserves native frames and heap for debugging |
| `SYS_PTRACE` capability | `createdump` calls `ptrace()` to snapshot the crashing process |
| `emptyDir` volume | Dumps survive container restart (within the pod lifecycle) so you can `kubectl cp` them out |

## Retrieving a dump

```bash
kubectl cp <pod>:/tmp/dumps/ ./dumps/ -c app
```

For **durable collection**, consider replacing `emptyDir` with a PersistentVolumeClaim or adding a sidecar that uploads dumps to blob storage on detection.
